query: SELECT id, title, status, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisResults, '$.suggestions[0].frameTimestampSec') as first_frame_sec, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisResults, '$.suggestions[0].frameTimestamp') as first_frame_ts FROM video_analyses ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 2;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QwrFpHdig3uztGQ.root --database ENhuhCf7SLWoUcgY9QEkFN --execute SELECT id, title, status, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisResults, '$.suggestions[0].frameTimestampSec') as first_frame_sec, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisResults, '$.suggestions[0].frameTimestamp') as first_frame_ts FROM video_analyses ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 2;
